arts.ttl: Plymouth show the magic of the cup is still well and truly alive, writes LEWIS STEELE - as boss Miron Muslic reveals his unusual celebration plans
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE AT HOME PARK: Plymouth boss Miron Muslic urged the Argyle fans to enjoy a night on the tiles and turn the city green after the most famous win in the club's history.

arts.ttl: 'How did Liverpool go today?' - Ange Postecoglou asks FA Cup question after Plymouth Argyle loss
arts.sum: Liverpool losing to Plymouth Argyle was brought up by Ange Postecoglou after Tottenham Hotspur also exited the FA Cup at the fourth round stage after being beaten by Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Plymouth boss Miron Muslic hails his history-making team after their shock FA Cup win over Liverpool but says staying in the Championship would be an even bigger achievement
arts.sum: The Championship's bottom club beat Arne Slot's heavily-rotated high-flyers on Sunday afternoon through Ryan Hardie's second-half penalty, which was backed up by a steely defensive display.

arts.ttl: Harvey Elliott bemoans penalty decision after shock Liverpool FA Cup exit
arts.sum: Liverpool were stunned by Plymouth in the FA Cup, with Harvey Elliott feeling hard done by after giving away the penalty that ultimately secured the Pilgrims' win

arts.ttl: Essex police officer sacked after admitting ‘tragedy chanting’ at Anfield
arts.sum: Misconduct hearing found Tyler Coppin had breached standards of professional behaviour over offence An Essex police officer has been sacked after admitting “tragedy chanting” at Liverpool fans during a Premier League match last year. Essex police instigated misconduct proceedings against Sgt Tyler Coppin after he pleaded guilty to the public order offence during the Liverpool game against Chelsea at Anfield last October. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot gives injury update on Joe Gomez after Liverpool star limped off just eight minutes into shock FA Cup defeat by Plymouth Argyle
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has given fans an update on the status of Joe Gomez after the defendr had to be replaced just eight minutes into Sunday's shock FA Cup defeat to Plymouth Argyle.

arts.ttl: Harvey Elliott criticises Plymouth penalty award as Liverpool star takes swipe at referee
arts.sum: Plymouth secured a famous FA Cup win as they ousted Liverpool with a penalty, given against Harvey Elliott in the second half, leading to the game's winning goal

arts.ttl: 'Magical day' for Plymouth - vote for biggest FA Cup shock
arts.sum: Plymouth Argyle celebrate a "magical" FA Cup win over Liverpool - vote for your biggest shock in the competition.

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Chelsea in January approaches to Benfica – €50m and €80m players on agenda
arts.sum: Liverpool and Chelsea were among the top clubs to have looked at Benfica players in the winter market. That’s according to Jornal de Notícias, and they cover the interest shown by several clubs in Benfica’s Álvaro Carreras and Tomás Araújo. The report states Liverpool, Chelsea, Paris Saint-Germain and Bayern Munich all contacted the Eagles to The post Liverpool and Chelsea in January approaches to Benfica – €50m and €80m players on agenda appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot delivers Joe Gomez injury update as Liverpool face nervous Merseyside derby wait
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot delivers an update on Joe Gomez's condition after the defender was taken off injured in Sunday's 1-0 FA Cup loss to Plymouth Argyle.
